criteria.text: Running 'node 01-read-file' from the repository root prints the contents of 01-read-file/text.txt to the console
File reading is implemented with ReadStream; no synchronous fs calls are used
Running 'node 02-write-file' creates a file inside 02-write-file/ and prints a prompt
Each line entered by the user is appended to that file (previous content is preserved)
The process keeps waiting for further input after each write
Typing 'exit' prints a farewell message and terminates the process
Pressing Ctrl + C prints a farewell message and terminates the process
Running 'node 03-files-in-folder' lists files from 03-files-in-folder/secret-folder to the console
Each line is formatted as '<file name> - <extension> - <size>'
Subdirectories are not listed; only files directly inside secret-folder appear
After running 'node 04-copy-directory', the files-copy folder exists and exactly mirrors the contents of files
Rerunning the script after files are added/modified inside 'files' updates 'files-copy' accordingly
Rerunning the script after files are removed from 'files' also removes them from 'files-copy'
After running 'node 05-merge-styles', project-dist/bundle.css exists and contains the concatenated contents of every .css file inside 'styles'
Files with extensions other than .css and any subdirectories inside 'styles' are ignored
Rerunning the script overwrites bundle.css with the up-to-date content of 'styles'
After running 'node 06-build-page', the project-dist folder is created and contains index.html, style.css, and an assets/ folder
index.html is built by substituting every {{component-name}} tag in template.html with the contents of components/<component-name>.html
style.css is a bundle of all .css files from the 'styles' folder
assets/ is an exact copy of 06-build-page/assets/
The original template.html is not modified by the script
Two template tags written on the same line separated only by spaces (e.g. '{{about}} {{articles}}') are processed as separate components without errors

Rerunning the script after a new component is added to components/ and its tag is added to template.html correctly updates project-dist/index.html. Changes inside styles/ and assets/ are also picked up
A third-party module is used in any subtask
A synchronous fs function is used in any subtask (per subtask, up to -240)
setTimeout() is used
fsPromises.cp() is used in task 04 or task 06 (per subtask)
The repository is not publicly accessible at the time of cross-check
